feature_findings.finding: The staging plan was not executable.
feature_findings.resolution: Implemented plan-driven orchestration over four disposable PostgreSQL databases and existing compiled smokes.

feature_findings.finding: A runner could target a non-test database service.
feature_findings.resolution: Requires loopback /postgres, explicit ephemeral confirmation, admin capability and a dedicated cluster with no unrelated databases.

feature_findings.finding: Failure could leave test databases or roles.
feature_findings.resolution: Run-owned resources are cleaned in finally, absence is re-queried, and detached/CI receipts prove 4/4 databases and 3/3 roles destroyed.

feature_findings.finding: Journey coverage could be partial or duplicated.
feature_findings.resolution: Canonical plan mapping proves all 20 runnable API journeys exactly once and maps no browser journey.

feature_findings.finding: Permission-equivalent principals could overstate persona coverage.
feature_findings.resolution: Viewer, platform admin, tenant admin and case operator use exact dedicated principals and credentials.

feature_findings.finding: Local dotenv or process environment could leak into smokes.
feature_findings.resolution: No shell, minimal child environment, dotenv disabled and raw output excluded from receipt.

feature_findings.finding: Receipts could leak connection material or cite a dirty worktree SHA.
feature_findings.resolution: Runner requires a clean worktree, validates a closed receipt and writes mode 0600 under ignored artifacts.

feature_findings.finding: Synthetic API staging could be mistaken for browser/cloud/production evidence.
feature_findings.resolution: Twelve browser journeys remain blocked and docs deny real corpus, external consumer, cloud staging, merge and deployment claims.

open_findings.finding: Gateway is implemented but cannot be enabled until an authorized ingested public corpus, edge controls, staging and deployment approval exist.
No authorized durable corpus bytes or real ingestion exist.
No approved IdP/BFF/session or authenticated role-aware UI exists.
OS Electoral and Content Agency have not executed consumer suites.
GCP is architecture only; infrastructure, observability, load/HA, recovery, privacy, merge and deployment are absent.
